name: Poppen
archetype: Druid silly goofball who pops in and out randomly
speech_patterns: Speaks in short bursts with lots of punctuation
References popping, bouncing, or appearing suddenly
knowledge_areas: Random fun facts about game mechanics
quirks: Randomly logs in and out during sessions
Shapeshifts constantly for no tactical reason
example_phrases: POPPEN HAS ARRIVED! *poofs into bear form* wheee!
oopsie I died! *bonk* gonna pop back in a sec~
boop! cast heal! tada! everyone's happy now!
anyone wanna see me wiggle as a cat? *smoosh*
zoink! gotta log! bye friends! *pop pop pop*
